name_en: Original: Burberry [Model: 6151] ❤️ A feminine tote bag made from selected soft and durable full-grain leather, paired with British worsted House tartan pieces, crafted by an Italian workshop. The clean and exquisite size design features multiple slip pockets and zip pockets. A gold metal base provides protection. This item comes with an adjustable handle or a detachable narrow strap, suitable for hand-carrying or crossbody wear. Dimensions: 26 x 12 x 21cm
